ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 var str = "P" ++ (vars.queryParams.duration default 30) ++"D" --- (now() - str) as Date

logger.doc:name: Sent params
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: vars.userId, activityType: vars.queryParams.activityType, metricType: vars.queryParams.metricType, stage: vars.queryParams.sleep_stage, startDate: vars.queryParams.startDate, endDate: vars.queryParams.endDate, resolvedStartDate: vars.resolvedStartDate, resolvedEndDate: vars.resolvedEndDate } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO","Querying wearable data",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT metric_type,unit, AVG(value) as average,MIN(value) as min, MAX(value) as max,COUNT(*) as count FROM point_metrics WHERE user_id = :user_id AND recorded_at BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedMetricTypes= if(vars.queryParams.metricType != null ) vars.queryParams.metricType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var metricTypeClause= if (sanitizedMetricTypes != null) " AND metric_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedMetricTypes map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY metric_type, unit"
--- baseSQL ++ metricTypeClause ++ endClause
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { user_id: vars.userId as Number, resolvedStartDate: vars.resolvedStartDate, resolvedEndDate: vars.resolvedEndDate }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (item)->{ metric_type: item.metric_type, startDate: vars.resolvedStartDate, endDate: vars.resolvedEndDate, average: item.average, min: item.min, max: item.max, count: item.count, unit: item.unit }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { user_id: vars.userId, resolvedStartDate: vars.resolvedStartDate, resolvedEndDate: vars.resolvedEndDate }

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.id) as total_workouts,SUM(w.duration) as total_duration, w.duration_unit, SUM(CASE WHEN ws.metric_type IN ('active_energy_burned', 'basal_energy_burned' ) THEN ws.sum_value ELSE 0 END) as total_energy_burned FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_statistics ws ON ws.workout_id = w.id WHERE user_id = :user_id AND start_time BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedactivityType= if(vars.queryParams.activityType != null ) vars.queryParams.activityType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var activityTypeClause= if (sanitizedactivityType != null) " AND activity_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedactivityType map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY w.duration_unit"
--- baseSQL ++ activityTypeClause ++ endClause

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = " SELECT w.activity_type, ws.metric_type, ws.unit,COUNT(DISTINCT w.id) as count, SUM(ws.sum_value) as sum_value, AVG(ws.average_value) as avg_value,MIN(ws.minimum_value) as min_value,MAX(ws.maximum_value) as max_value FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_statistics ws ON ws.workout_id = w.id WHERE user_id = :user_id AND start_time BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedactivityType= if(vars.queryParams.activityType != null ) vars.queryParams.activityType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var activityTypeClause= if (sanitizedactivityType != null) " AND activity_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedactivityType map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY w.activity_type, ws.metric_type, ws.unit"
--- baseSQL ++ activityTypeClause ++ endClause

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT stage, SUM(duration_seconds) as stage_duration FROM sleep_sessions WHERE user_id = :user_id AND start_time BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedSleepStages= if(vars.queryParams.sleep_stage != null ) vars.queryParams.sleep_stage map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var sleepStageClause= if (sanitizedSleepStages != null) " AND stage IN (" ++ (sanitizedSleepStages map ("'" ++ lower($) ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY stage"
--- baseSQL ++ sleepStageClause ++ endClause
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { user_id: vars.userId as Number, resolvedStartDate: vars.resolvedStartDate, resolvedEndDate: vars.resolvedEndDate }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { user_id: vars.userId as Number, resolvedStartDate: vars.resolvedStartDate, resolvedEndDate: vars.resolvedEndDate }

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT metric_type,unit, AVG(value) as average,MIN(value) as min, MAX(value) as max,COUNT(*) as count FROM point_metrics WHERE user_id = :user_id AND recorded_at BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedMetricTypes= if(vars.queryParams.metricType != null ) vars.queryParams.metricType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var metricTypeClause= if (sanitizedMetricTypes != null) " AND metric_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedMetricTypes map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY metric_type, unit"
--- baseSQL ++ metricTypeClause ++ endClause

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT stage, SUM(duration_seconds) as stage_duration FROM sleep_sessions WHERE user_id = :user_id AND start_time BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedSleepStages= if(vars.queryParams.sleep_stage != null ) vars.queryParams.sleep_stage map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var sleepStageClause= if (sanitizedSleepStages != null) " AND stage IN (" ++ (sanitizedSleepStages map ("'" ++ lower($) ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY stage"
--- baseSQL ++ sleepStageClause ++ endClause

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.id) as total_workouts,SUM(w.duration) as total_duration, w.duration_unit, SUM(CASE WHEN ws.metric_type IN ('active_energy_burned', 'basal_energy_burned' ) THEN ws.sum_value ELSE 0 END) as total_energy_burned FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_statistics ws ON ws.workout_id = w.id WHERE user_id = :user_id AND start_time BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedactivityType= if(vars.queryParams.activityType != null ) vars.queryParams.activityType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var activityTypeClause= if (sanitizedactivityType != null) " AND activity_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedactivityType map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY w.duration_unit"
--- baseSQL ++ activityTypeClause ++ endClause

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var baseSQL = " SELECT w.activity_type, ws.metric_type, ws.unit,COUNT(DISTINCT w.id) as count, SUM(ws.sum_value) as sum_value, AVG(ws.average_value) as avg_value,MIN(ws.minimum_value) as min_value,MAX(ws.maximum_value) as max_value FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_statistics ws ON ws.workout_id = w.id WHERE user_id = :user_id AND start_time BETWEEN :resolvedStartDate AND :resolvedEndDate"
var sanitizedactivityType= if(vars.queryParams.activityType != null ) vars.queryParams.activityType map ((item) -> item replace /[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/ with "") else null
var activityTypeClause= if (sanitizedactivityType != null) " AND activity_type IN (" ++ (sanitizedactivityType map ("'" ++ $ ++ "'") joinBy ", ") ++ ")" else ""
var endClause = " GROUP BY w.activity_type, ws.metric_type, ws.unit"
--- baseSQL ++ activityTypeClause ++ endClause

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-404", message: "No data found for the given user and filters", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: error.description, userId: vars.userId } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("ERROR","An Error Occured",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-500", message: "Server Currently Unavailable", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
